name: Multica
description: Open-source platform to manage AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, …) as team members — assign tasks, track progress, reuse skills. This greffon hosts the Multica SERVER (web + API + Postgres); the agent daemon runs on your own machine and points at this instance. Login is by emailed verification code, so you MUST link an SMTP integration to this instance — without one, the code is only written to the server logs and never delivered. Multica supports STARTTLS or implicit TLS (SSL); plaintext SMTP is not supported. Note: the Usage and Runtime dashboards stay at zero unless a periodic rollup_task_usage_hourly() job is scheduled (the bundled Postgres has no pg_cron); core features (issues, agents, chat, real-time updates) are unaffected.

value.title: JWT secret
value.description: Signs auth tokens. Generated by the platform at instance creation.
